cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the beach. So the problem says that Leslie went to the beach today. We need to find out between what times that could have happened. First, let me list out the information given about Leslie's schedule: - Leslie woke up at 5am. - Emily saw Leslie attending class at school from 5am to 9am. - Anthony saw Leslie watching a movie at the theater from 9am to 11am. - Thomas saw Leslie buying cookies at a bakery from 11am to 4pm. - Ashley
